queries.name: mcp_launches
queries.query: ("MCP" OR "Model Context Protocol" OR "mcp server") (launch OR launched OR launching OR released OR release OR shipped OR "now live" OR beta OR GA OR "Product Hunt") -filter:replies

queries.name: cross_host_pain
queries.query: ("MCP" OR "Model Context Protocol" OR plugin) (Cursor OR Codex OR "Claude Code" OR OpenCode) (packaging OR plugin OR manifest OR install OR auth OR hooks OR rules OR agents OR portability OR "cross-host" OR distribution)

queries.name: monetization_asks
queries.query: ("MCP" OR "mcp server") (monetize OR monetization OR pricing OR customers OR users OR distribution OR GTM OR growth OR adoption OR revenue OR sell)

queries.name: founder_help
queries.query: ("MCP" OR "mcp server") ("how do I" OR "looking for" OR need OR help OR advice) (grow OR distribute OR launch OR monetize OR package)

queries.name: platform_team_signals
queries.query: (MCP OR plugin OR agent workflow) (platform team OR DevEx OR "developer experience" OR "engineering productivity" OR standardize OR rollout OR guardrails OR internal)
